resume-parser.description: Parses PDF/DOCX resumes into structured data. No LLM.

ats-scorer.description: Scores resumes against JDs using TF-IDF and rules. No LLM.

keyword-matcher.description: Semantic skill matching using sentence-transformers embeddings. No LLM.

latex-builder.description: Builds resume PDFs from structured data using LaTeX templates. No LLM.

llm.note: LLM is only used for bullet rewriting and summary generation. All other tasks are rule-based MCP tools.
